title: Sync Plans Request
description: Push campaign plans to the governance agent. A plan defines the authorized parameters for a campaign -- budget limits, channels, flight dates, and authorized markets.

plans.description: One or more campaign plans to sync.

brand.description: Brand being governed. The governance agent resolves the brand's compliance configuration to determine applicable policies.

objectives.description: Natural language campaign objectives. Used for strategic alignment validation.

authority_level.description: Budget authority level for the orchestrator agent.

per_seller_max_pct.description: Maximum percentage of budget that can go to a single seller.

reallocation_threshold.description: Amount above which reallocations require escalation (for agent_limited).

channels.description: Channel constraints. If omitted, all channels are allowed.

required.description: Channels that must be included in the media mix.

mix_targets.description: Target allocation ranges per channel, keyed by channel ID.

flight.description: Authorized flight dates. Media buys with dates outside this window are rejected.

countries.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes for authorized markets (e.g., ['US', 'GB']). The governance agent rejects media buys targeting outside these countries and resolves applicable policies by matching against policy jurisdictions.

regions.description: ISO 3166-2 subdivision codes for authorized sub-national markets (e.g., ['US-MA', 'US-CA']). When present, the governance agent restricts buys to these specific regions rather than the full country. Use for campaigns limited to specific states or provinces (e.g., cannabis in legal states). Policy resolution matches against both the subdivision and its parent country.

approved_sellers.description: List of approved seller agent URLs. null means any seller.
